# Green Logistics Rwanda

> Premier logistics company headquartered in Magerwa — Kigali's import/export
> hub. We move cargo for businesses and individuals across Rwanda and beyond:
> customs clearance, cargo transport, warehousing, door-to-door and last-mile
> distribution — with live shipment tracking.

- Location: Magerwa, Kigali, Rwanda
- Phone / WhatsApp: +250 788 279 643
- Email: greenlogisticsrwanda@gmail.com
- Working hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Website: https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com

## Services
- Custom Logistics Solutions — tailored supply-chain strategies for complex needs; cut cost and save time.
- Customs Clearance — full customs documentation and compliance for smooth, fast cross-border trade.
- Door-to-Door Services — seamless end-to-end handling from pickup to final delivery.
- Warehousing & Storage — secure, climate-controlled, 24/7-monitored short- and long-term storage.
- Cargo Transportation — reliable transport across Rwanda and beyond; GPS-tracked fleet, experienced drivers.
- Distribution & Delivery — fast, accurate last-mile distribution from warehouse to customer doorstep.

## Shipment tracking
- Customers track shipments at https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com/track
- Tracking number format: GLR-YYYY-NNNN (e.g. GLR-2026-0001)

## Key pages
- Home: https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com/
- Services: https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com/services
- About: https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com/about
- Track a shipment: https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com/track
- Contact / request a quote: https://greenlogisticsrwanda.com/contact

## About
Mission: To simplify logistics across Rwanda by delivering timely, reliable,
and cost-effective services that drive business growth and keep the country
moving. Vision: To be Rwanda's most trusted logistics partner. Our strategic
base in Magerwa sits at the crossroads of Rwanda's import and export trade,
letting us clear, move, and deliver goods faster for businesses of every size.
